description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly black and gray color scheme. The body is robust, with a polymer or composite stock and fore-end, and a prominent vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The receiver and barrel assembly are streamlined, with a short, vented barrel shroud and a box magazine located just ahead of the trigger guard. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped, and the buttstock is solid with a slightly textured pad. The overall build suggests a modern, urban tactical shotgun suitable for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a black and gray finish, vertical foregrip, and box magazine, designed for urban close-quarters scenarios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, box magazine, pistol grip, vertical foregrip, and solid buttstock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, vented barrel shroud, and the alignment of the foregrip and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with more detail on the receiver and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the top rail of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented barrel shroud
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with slight reinforcement and ergonomic finger grooves
